content_fingerprint: openai publishes root cause analysis of gpt 5 goblin personality behavior openai has released a detailed account of how personality driven quirks colloquially called goblin outputs emerged in gpt 5 tracing the timeline identifying the technical root cause and documenting the fixes deployed to suppress them openai has published an article titled where the goblins came from providing a post mortem on a wave of oddly persona driven outputs that users began reporting in gpt 5 earlier this year the piece lays out a chronological account of when and how the behavior surfaced identifies the specific
